hotels.description_en:
Bluestone on George is a stylish property situated in the city centre of Dunedin, offering great views over the city to the surrounding hills and Otago Peninsula.
The sound-proofed studios at Bluestone are self-contained and feature electric blankets, LED Smart TVs and free WiFI. The bathrooms have under-floor heating and luxurious amenities. Rooms with spa-baths are available.
Facilities at Bluestone on George include a guest lounge, where you can purchase wine, cold beers and platters. Light room service menu offering breakfast and platters is available.
Free off-street parking is provided. Shopping, restaurants and cafes are located only 200 metres away.

Comfortable Amenities: Each room features a private bathroom, tea and coffee maker, and garden views. Additional amenities include a balcony, spa bath, and barbecue, providing relaxation and outdoor dining options.
Convenient Location: Located 12 km from Taieri Gorge Railway and Toitu Otago Settlers Museum, and 13 km from Otago Museum and Forsyth Barr Stadium. Dunedin Airport is 23 km away. Nearby attractions include St. Clair Golf Club and Dunedin Railway Station.

hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: The Princes Apartment in Dunedin is housed in a historic building, offering a spacious environment with garden and terrace views.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi in public areas, air-conditioning, balcony, and streaming services. The apartment includes a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and dishwasher.
Comfortable Living: The apartment features two bedrooms, a living room, and a bathroom with a walk-in shower. Additional amenities include a dining area, sofa bed, and soundproofing.
Prime Location: Located 27 km from Dunedin Airport, the property is a short walk from Taieri Gorge Railway and Toitu Otago Settlers Museum. Nearby attractions include Dunedin Railway Station and Otago Museum.
